context_windows.raw_context:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Tokenoskobi / Coinoskobi - Token Yaşam Merkezi</title>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#020813;
  --side:#061427;
  --side2:#07182d;
  --main:#03101f;
  --card:#071a2f;
  --card2:#061426;
  --line:rgba(112,202,255,.18);
  --line2:rgba(112,202,255,.09);
  --text:#eff8ff;
  --soft:#b8c9dc;
  --muted:#7d91a8;
  --green:#20f3aa;
  --cyan:#5cd6ff;
  --blue:#7ba7ff;
  --red:#ff3a5c;
  --yellow:#ffd35c;
  --purple:#c57cff;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{margin:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Arial,sans-serif}
body{overflow:hidden}
.shell{
  width:100vw;height:100vh;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:286px 1fr;
  gap:16px;
  padding:6px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 14% 0%, rgba(28,243,170,.10), transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 8%, rgba(92,214,255,.09), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(135deg,#010610,#061320 52%,#020813);
}
.sidebar{
  min-height:0;
  border:1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius:8px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 0%, rgba(32,243,170,.12), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(7,24,45,.96),rgba(3,12,24,.96));
  box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.28), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.015);
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.brand{
  padding:24px 20px 20px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);
}
.brand-main{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px}
.logo{
  width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;position:relative;flex:0 0 auto;
  border:2px solid rgba(32,243,170,.8);
  box-shadow
